name:
I'm at the bottom of a very deep chasm. High above me is
a pair of ledges. One has a bricked up window across its face
the other faces a Throne-room
description:
I'm at the bottom of a very deep chasm. High above me is
a pair of ledges. One has a bricked up window across its face
the other faces a Throne-room
items_start:
Sign: `magic word's AWAY! Look la...`
(Rest of sign is missing!)
hints: The golden net is a treasure - take it. The sign confirms the magic word AWAY. The lava blocks passage.
The lava is too hot to cross directly. You need to cool it somehow. What do you have that could put out lava?
DROP WATER (from the bottle) on the lava to cool it. This creates fire bricks you can use.
GET NET. DROP WATER on the lava to solidify it into fire bricks. Then take the bricks to brick up the window in the royal chamber.
notes: Bottom of the chasm with the golden net treasure and a lava stream. Dropping water on lava creates fire bricks. The sign confirms the AWAY magic word. The ledges above connect to the royal chamber and throne room areas.
